name: Kyowakogyosyo Co.,Ltd.
summary: Kyowakogyosyo Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of hexagon bolts, JIS hexagon socket head cap screws, bolts for construction machinery and internal combustion engines, cold-forged parts for automobiles, and special cold-/hot-forged parts in Japan. It also provides automobile parts, such as transmission, steering and suspension, and other forging parts; gears; and industrial bolts. The company was founded in 1950 and is based in Komatsu, Japan.
